header: Publish your first changelog in four steps
description: A quick setup path from connecting your repository to sharing a polished, on-brand release note with your users.

items.title: Connect your repository
items.content: Link GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket with one click. Desiderio reads merged pull requests and labels automatically — no scripts or webhooks to configure.

items.title: Generate a draft from your merges
items.content: Pick a date range or milestone and let the AI group changes into Added, Fixed, and Improved. You get an editable draft in plain language, not commit messages.

items.title: Edit and match your brand
items.content: Refine the copy in the editor, drop in screenshots, and apply your colors and logo. Reusable templates keep every release consistent.

items.title: Publish and notify
items.content: Push the changelog to your hosted page, embed widget, or RSS feed, and email subscribers in the same step. Schedule it or ship it instantly.
